title: Na'daz
content:
{{Top|pga|leg}} {{GAreview}} {{Character |type=Sith |image= |name=Na'daz |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[1010 BBY]]''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Sith Order (disambiguation)|Sith Order]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Kas'im]] }} {{Quote|My Master was a great Sith Lord. He was particularly adept in the arts of lightsaber combat—a skill he passed on to me.|Kas'im, regarding Na'daz|}} '''Na'daz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] who lived near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]] who was exceptionally skilled in the art of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]. While on a visit to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], Na'daz found the young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Twi'lek [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Kas'im]] and bought him. Na'daz brought the young boy to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and [[Sith training|trained]] him as his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]]. In [[1010 BBY]], Na'daz was [[Duel between Kas'im and Na'daz|challenged]] by his apprentice in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] and [[Death/Legends|slain]]. Kas'im later gave [[Darth Bane's lightsaber/Legends|Na'daz's lightsaber]] to his pupil, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|As a young child I would watch for hours as my Master performed his drills. My earliest memories are of dancing ruby lights moving through the sequences of battle.|Kas'im|}} Na'daz was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] who lived during the final years of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He was a skilled combatant with a [[Curved-hilt lightsaber/Legends|curved-hilt lightsaber]]. Later during his life, Na'daz traveled to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and discovered a young, [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Twi'lek [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] named [[Kas'im]]. Na'daz bought the boy and took him to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], where he [[Sith training|trained]] him as his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]. By 1010 BBY, Kas'im had become stronger in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and more skilled in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] than his Master, and he challenged Na'daz in a [[Duel between Kas'im and Na'daz|duel]]. Na'daz was defeated and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by his pupil, who took [[Darth Bane's lightsaber/Legends|Na'daz's lightsaber]] as a trophy. Kas'im eventually became one of the greatest [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duelists]] of his time and trained many young [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Kas'im later gave Na'daz's lightsaber to his student, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]], who eventually became a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] after defeating his rival apprentice, [[Sirak]]. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|I had learned all I could from Master Na'daz. As strong as he was in the dark side, I was stronger. As skilled as he was with the lightsaber, I became better.''"
"''But why kill him?''"
"''A test. To see if I was as strong as I believed.|Kas'im and Bane|}} Na'daz was considered to be a great Sith [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] by his apprentice, Kas'im, and was a skilled lightsaber duelist—a trait he passed on to his apprentice. Na'daz used a curved-hilt, [[Red (disambiguation)|red]]-bladed lightsaber in combat, which his apprentice took after killing Na'daz. Na'daz also taught Kas'im how to use a [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]]. ==Behind the scenes== Na'daz's first and only mention in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] was in [[Drew Karpyshyn]]'s [[2006]] novel, ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Na'daz |fi=Na'daz |hu=Na'daz |pl=Na'daz |pt=Legends:Na'daz |tr=Na'daz }} [[Category:Dark Lords of the Sith of the New Sith Wars]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sith Lords of the New Sith Wars]] [[Category:Sith Masters]] [[Category:Twi'leks]]
